questions.question: How many cats are visible in the frames?
questions.rationale: Establishes the number of animals present in the scene

questions.question: What is the primary setting where these animals are located?
questions.answer_key: An indoor hallway or entryway with wooden flooring
questions.rationale: Describes the spatial environment essential for understanding the scene context

questions.question: What are the cats doing in these frames?
questions.answer_key: Playing, wrestling, or interacting with each other on the floor
questions.rationale: Captures the behavioral activity and engagement level of the animals
